description: Replace github.com/moby/moby/pkg/parsers/kernel with a local implementation using golang.org/x/sys/unix.Uname(), then remove the moby/moby dependency entirely from go.mod. The moby/moby module at v20.10.17+incompatible is a legacy pre-modules version with known issues. Since v29.3.1 does not exist as a Go module (the project moved to github.com/moby/moby/v2 which only has beta releases), the correct upgrade path is to remove the dependency entirely rather than bump it. The only usage is kernel.GetKernelVersion() in internal/modalias/modalias.go which calls uname() and parses the release string - trivially replaceable.
steps: Step 1: Create a new internal package internal/kernel/kernel.go (with //go:build linux build tag) that provides a GetKernelVersion() (string, error) function. Implementation: call unix.Uname(), extract the Release field as a string using unix.ByteSliceToString(utsname.Release[:]), and return it. This replaces the full VersionInfo parsing since modalias.go only needs the version string for path construction.

Step 2: Create internal/kernel/kernel_test.go with a test that verifies GetKernelVersion() returns a non-empty string matching a kernel version pattern (e.g., contains a dot-separated version number). Use //go:build linux build tag.

Step 3: Update internal/modalias/modalias.go to replace the import of 'github.com/moby/moby/pkg/parsers/kernel' with the new local 'github.com/petercb/k3os-bin/internal/kernel' package. Change the getAliasesFile() function: replace 'kernelVersion, err := kernel.GetKernelVersion()' followed by 'fmt.Sprintf("/lib/modules/%s", kernelVersion)' with 'ver, err := kernel.GetKernelVersion()' followed by 'fmt.Sprintf("/lib/modules/%s", ver)'. The new function returns a string directly instead of a *VersionInfo that gets formatted via String().

Step 4: Run 'go mod tidy' to remove github.com/moby/moby from go.mod and go.sum (it should no longer be needed by any import). Also verify that gotest.tools/v3 is removed if it was only an indirect dependency of moby/moby.
Step 5: Update .kiro/steering/tech.md to remove or update the reference to 'github.com/moby/moby/pkg/reexec' in the Key Dependencies table since moby/moby is no longer a dependency at all.
Step 6: Run 'go test ./...' to confirm all tests still pass. Run 'GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o k3os .' to confirm build still succeeds. Run 'go vet ./...' for correctness.
acceptance_criteria: github.com/moby/moby no longer appears in go.mod
No Go source files import any package from github.com/moby/moby
internal/kernel/kernel.go exists with GetKernelVersion() (string, error) using unix.Uname()
internal/modalias/modalias.go uses the new internal/kernel package
verification: grep -r 'github.com/moby/moby' --include='*.go' . && echo 'FAIL: moby/moby still imported' || echo 'PASS: no moby/moby imports'
grep 'github.com/moby/moby' go.mod && echo 'FAIL: moby/moby still in go.mod' || echo 'PASS: moby/moby removed from go.mod'
